# Allowlist — PEM filenames permitted for rsync to edge-2

# Add new domains to the domains array in vault-acme-issue-all.sh.
#
# This repo copy is a seed template for initial bootstrap only.
# The runtime version on edge nodes is regenerated on every ACME run.
#
# One filename per line (basename only, no paths).
# Must match: ^[A-Za-z0-9._-]+\.pem$
#
# Deployed to: /etc/haproxy/certsync/allowlist.txt
# =============================================================================
